name: forseti-ledger
description: Public, build-in-public track record of Forseti — an oversight layer for self-custody DeFi agents. Static, redaction-gated entries auto-deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.note: entries/*.md, index.md and feed.xml are GENERATED by scripts/generate-ledger-index.ts in the source repo (via the /publish-ledger skill) — do not hand-edit. Cloudflare Pages build command stays EMPTY; output dir = repo root.
